caption: Seam localization for consonants k/nn/zh across the 12 vowels (font: noto). Green box = separable-glyph vowel sign (union of non-base glyphs); orange box = ligature sign (diff vs the bare consonant); no box = inherent 'a'. The orange cases are where the vowel fuses with the base, so the sign is not cleanly separable — results are reported stratified by seam_source (DEC-0006).
